provenance.authority: IGN Geoplateforme WFS AOC-VITICOLES:aire_parcellaire (INAO delimited AOC parcels), Licence Ouverte Etalab
provenance.membership_source: data/wine-map/inao-denomination-membership.json (exact member names + parcel counts, pinned in-repo)
provenance.method: GENERALIZED_FROM_OFFICIAL_SOURCE - server-side denom LIKE bound, client-side exact membership match, client-side concave dissolve (same engine as the live pipeline).
caveats: Rasteau here is the dry red cru (member 'Rasteau', 271 parcels); the sweet 'Rasteau Vin Doux Naturel' (669) and 'Muscat de Beaumes-de-Venise' (400) are separate co-located VDN appellations - deferred.

VACQUEYRAS is NOT present as a standalone denomination in the pinned INAO membership file (verified absent), so it is deliberately omitted rather than guessed - it needs a manual source or a membership-file refresh before inclusion.
display names hyphenate 'Beaumes de Venise' -> Beaumes-de-Venise; members are the exact INAO names.
DEFERRED follow-ups: the france.rhone REGION outline (dissolve of 'Cotes du Rhone', ~18,181 parcels) and the sweet VDN/Muscat appellations.

modeling_decision: These 8 are Southern Rhone communal crus: is_appellation=true, appellation_level=village, appellation_system=AOC, classification=GENERALIZED_FROM_OFFICIAL_SOURCE, primary_parent=france.rhone, tier 2. Region place france.rhone (display 'Vallee du Rhone', tier 1) built later from the 'Cotes du Rhone' dissolve; optional france.rhone.septentrionale / .meridionale district split at build time (owner call). Grapes: Grenache/Syrah/Mourvedre (GSM) reds; Tavel is rose (Grenache-led). Scoring links: exact-name against live reference rows (never fuzzy); appellations without an exact scoring row stay PENDING. NOT run live - reviewable groundwork; the catalog/boundary/flip/links/content build waits on the owner shape-review gate.
